claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: "THE CREATOR-FIRST GENERATIVE AI PLATFORM" clearly states the value proposition.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The link to 'Pricing' is available directly on the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: Explore our clear, easy to follow documentation or speak with our team to deploy Leonardo’s API in your environment.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: "Connect to Leonardo’s full creative stack through a single image and video generation API, supporting workflows like text-to-image, image-to-image, and image-to-video generation, all in one place."

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Your input images are private and accessible only to you.
